query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role 
FROM users u 
WHERE u.activo = 1 
AND u.id NOT IN (SELECT usuarioId FROM proyecto_usuarios WHERE proyectoId = 1);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3B47TRBhQthMPN1.da4a966d722d --database LjHhpq7m8HsaWSJ2BF6kdt --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role 
FROM users u 
WHERE u.activo = 1 
AND u.id NOT IN (SELECT usuarioId FROM proyecto_usuarios WHERE proyectoId = 1);
